prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科最低位次分别为约12135→10741→10580→15913→9130名，波动较大。2024年位次大幅后移至15913名，2025年又显著前移至9130名，近两年呈剧烈 震荡态势；2025年基准位次约9130名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年131人、2022年135人、2023年137人、2024年128人、2025年139人；2026年（ §7）计划大幅扩招至198人，较2025年增加59人（+42.5%），扩招幅度显著，理论上会拉低录取门槛，使位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高 校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于中上水平理工类强校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因为实验室 爆炸火灾事故，可能对考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第45位，评价为较热，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显爆款传播；系统科学A+（全国 顶尖）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A类学科，在211高校中学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生；河南省2026年普通高考报名总人数约120万人（较2025年约90.7万大 幅增加约32%），物理类考生按比例估算约73.2万人，竞争显著加剧，推动位次前移（数字减小）；北京交通大学位于北京市，对河南省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大（2026年物理类198人），属于在京211高校 中在豫招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9130名、2026年大幅扩招42.5%（使位次后移）、河南省考生总数大幅增加约32%（使位次前移）、声誉偏负面 （轻微抑制）、优势专业热度高（吸引高分）等多重因素，扩招与考生增加两大力量对冲后，预计位次较。预测2026年理科最低位次约11255名，区间10755–11755 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 12135 → 10741 → 10580 → 15913 → 9130, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, the ranking dropped sharply to 15913, but in 2025 it moved forward markedly to 9130, indicating a volatile trend in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9130. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 131 in 2021, 135 in 2022, 137 in 2023, 128 in 2024, 139 in 2025; in 2026 (§7), the plan expands significantly to 198, an increase of 59 (+42.5%) compared to 2025, which theoretically lowers the admission threshold and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 41st, with a stable range of 40–43 in recent years, making it a mid-to-high level strong science and engineering institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion and fire accident, which may mildly suppress candidates' application intentions. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 45th, evaluated as relatively hot, with moderate short video exposure and no obvious viral spread. It has 6 A-level disciplines: Systems Science A+ (top nationally), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, highlighting its outstanding disciplinary strength among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, aligning well with the university's advantageous disciplines, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Henan Province general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with physics category candidates estimated at about 732,000, intensifying competition and pushing rankings forward (smaller number). Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Henan candidates. The university enrolls a relatively large number of students in Henan (198 in physics category in 2026), making it one of the 211 universities in Beijing with a higher enrollment in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 9130, a significant 42.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing ranking backward), a substantial 32% increase in total Henan candidates (pushing ranking forward), a slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and high popularity of advantageous majors (attracting high scores), the expansion and candidate increase offset each other. The predicted 2026 science lowest ranking is approximately 11255, with a range of 10755–11755.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10755–11755, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Automation Class, Transportation Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class, Computer Class) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10755), you can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>11755), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 3294 → 2334 → 1954 → 3241 → 3030, showing significant fluctuations, reaching a low of 1954 in 2023 before rebounding, and maintaining above 3000 in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3030; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 8 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan expands to 19, an increase of 5 (+35.7%) from 2025, with consecutive years of expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings. Although strong in science and engineering, as a 211 university in Beijing, it still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (laboratory explosion incident), with moderate Douyin popularity (ranked 45), overall attention is moderate, without extreme negative public opinion impact; among the university's liberal arts-related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, Systems Science is rated A+, directly related to the Economic Management Experimental Class in liberal arts enrollment; law, journalism, and communication studies, among other liberal arts majors, are not rated in the A category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat is divided and wait-and-see, journalism and communication studies are clearly discouraged, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, overall liberal arts major heat is not high; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million, with history category candidates estimated at about 468,000 based on proportion, a significant increase of about 33% from 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition and pushing rankings forward (decreasing numbers); Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Henan liberal arts candidates; the 2026 history category plan has 19 spots, a moderate enrollment scale among 211 universities in Beijing for Henan liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3030, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 35.7% (pushing rankings backward), the significant increase of about 33% in Henan history category candidates (pushing rankings forward), and the generally moderate heat of liberal arts majors, after offsetting expansion and candidate increase, the ranking is expected to be lower. It is predicted that the 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking will be approximately 3599, with a range of 3099–4099.
